notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Harper reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Luis García Jr. Justin Crawford scores. Trea Turner to 3rd. Kyle Schwarber to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Harper reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Luis García Jr. Justin Crawford scores. Trea Turner to 3rd. Kyle Schwarber to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Daylen Lile singles on a line drive to right fielder Adolis García. CJ Abrams scores. Daylen Lile to 2nd. Throwing error by right fielder Adolis García.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead flies out to left fielder Brandon Marsh. Daylen Lile to 3rd.
